Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report based on all the information I've gathered.

## Comprehensive Claims Processing System Analysis Report

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, I've compiled a complete analysis of the SQLAlchemy models, domain concepts, and business constraints. Here's the full report:

---

## 1. COMPLETE SQLALCHEMY MODEL DEFINITIONS

All models are defined in a single file with full content below:

### File: `/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/app/models.py`

**Complete Content:**

```python
"""All enums and ORM models for the claims processing system.

Models are defined in FK-dependency order so SQLAlchemy can resolve
relationships without forward-reference strings:
Member → Provider → Plan → CoverageRule → Policy → Accumulator →
Claim → ClaimStatusHistory → AdjudicationResult → LineItem → Dispute → Payment
"""

import enum
import uuid
from datetime import date, datetime
from decimal import Decimal

from sqlalchemy import (
    Boolean,
    Date,
    DateTime,
    Enum,
    ForeignKey,
    Integer,
    Numeric,
    String,
    Text,
    UniqueConstraint,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship

from .extensions import Base

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enums
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ProviderType(enum.Enum):
    individual = "individual"
    facility = "facility"

class PolicyStatus(enum.Enum):
    active = "active"
    expired = "expired"
    cancelled = "cancelled"

class ClaimStatus(enum.Enum):
    submitted = "submitted"
    under_review = "under_review"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"
    partially_approved = "partially_approved"
    paid = "paid"

class ReviewType(enum.Enum):
    auto = "auto"
    manual = "manual"

class LineItemStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"

class DisputeStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    resolved = "resolved"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class Member(Base):
    """An individual insured person."""
    __tablename__ = "members"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    date_of_birth: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    email: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    phone: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=True)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="member")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="member")
    accumulators: Mapped[list["Accumulator"]] = relationship("Accumulator", back_populates="member")

class Provider(Base):
    """A healthcare professional or facility."""
    __tablename__ = "providers"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    npi: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), unique=True, nullable=False)
    provider_type: Mapped[ProviderType] = mapped_column(Enum(ProviderType), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

class Plan(Base):
    """Benefit structure template: coverage rules and deductible amount."""
    __tablename__ = "plans"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    deductible: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    coverage_rules: Mapped[list["CoverageRule"]] = relationship(
        "CoverageRule", back_populates="plan"
    )
    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="plan")

class CoverageRule(Base):
    """Coverage definition for a single CPT code on a plan.
    
    The (plan_id, cpt_code) uniqueness constraint for active rules is enforced
    at the service layer because SQLite lacks partial indexes without triggers.
    """
    __tablename__ = "coverage_rules"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    plan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("plans.id"), nullable=False)
    cpt_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False)
    is_covered: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False)
    coverage_percentage: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(5, 4), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    plan: Mapped[Plan] = relationship("Plan", back_populates="coverage_rules")

class Policy(Base):
    """A member's active instance of a plan for a specific policy period."""
    __tablename__ = "policies"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    plan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("plans.id"), nullable=False)
    start_date: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    end_date: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[PolicyStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(PolicyStatus), nullable=False, default=PolicyStatus.active
    )
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="policies")
    plan: Mapped[Plan] = relationship("Plan", back_populates="policies")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="policy")
    accumulator: Mapped["Accumulator | None"] = relationship(
        "Accumulator", back_populates="policy", uselist=False
    )

class Accumulator(Base):
    """Running deductible total per member per policy period."""
    __tablename__ = "accumulators"
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("member_id", "policy_id", name="uq_accumulator_member_policy"),
    )
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    policy_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("policies.id"), unique=True, nullable=False
    )
    deductible_met: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(
        Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False, default=Decimal("0.00")
    )
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="accumulators")
    policy: Mapped[Policy] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="accumulator")

class Claim(Base):
    """A reimbursement request submitted by or on behalf of a member."""
    __tablename__ = "claims"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    policy_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("policies.id"), nullable=False)
    provider_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("providers.id"), nullable=False)
    date_of_service: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[ClaimStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=False, default=ClaimStatus.submitted
    )
    review_type: Mapped[ReviewType] = mapped_column(
        Enum(ReviewType), nullable=False, default=ReviewType.auto
    )
    submitted_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="claims")
    policy: Mapped[Policy] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="claims")
    provider: Mapped[Provider] = relationship("Provider")
    line_items: Mapped[list["LineItem"]] = relationship(
        "LineItem",
        back_populates="claim",
        foreign_keys="LineItem.claim_id",
    )
    status_history: Mapped[list["ClaimStatusHistory"]] = relationship(
        "ClaimStatusHistory", back_populates="claim", order_by="ClaimStatusHistory.transitioned_at"
    )
    dispute: Mapped["Dispute | None"] = relationship(
        "Dispute", back_populates="claim", uselist=False
    )
    payment: Mapped["Payment | None"] = relationship(
        "Payment", back_populates="claim", uselist=False
    )

class ClaimStatusHistory(Base):
    """Append-only audit log of claim status transitions."""
    __tablename__ = "claim_status_history"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), nullable=False)
    from_status: Mapped[ClaimStatus | None] = mapped_column(Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=True)
    to_status: Mapped[ClaimStatus] = mapped_column(Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=False)
    transitioned_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    note: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    
    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="status_history")

class AdjudicationResult(Base):
    """Immutable record of a single adjudication pass on a line item.
    
    Re-adjudication appends a new row (revision + 1) rather than mutating.
    """
    __tablename__ = "adjudication_results"
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("line_item_id", "revision", name="uq_adjudication_line_revision"),
    )
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    line_item_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("line_items.id"), nullable=False
    )
    revision: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False)
    is_covered: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False)
    applied_to_deductible: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    plan_pays: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    member_owes: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    explanation: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    adjudicated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    
    line_item: Mapped["LineItem"] = relationship(
        "LineItem", back_populates="results", foreign_keys=[line_item_id]
    )

class LineItem(Base):
    """A single billable service within a claim.
    
    ``latest_result_id`` uses ``use_alter=True`` to resolve the mutual FK
    cycle with ``AdjudicationResult`` (SQLAlchemy emits it as a post-creation
    ALTER TABLE statement).
    """
    __tablename__ = "line_items"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), nullable=False)
    diagnosis_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False)
    cpt_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False)
    billed_amount: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    adjudication_status: Mapped[LineItemStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(LineItemStatus), nullable=False, default=LineItemStatus.pending
    )
    latest_result_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        ForeignKey("adjudication_results.id", use_alter=True, name="fk_line_item_latest_result"),
        nullable=True,
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship(
        "Claim", back_populates="line_items", foreign_keys=[claim_id]
    )
    results: Mapped[list[AdjudicationResult]] = relationship(
        "AdjudicationResult",
        back_populates="line_item",
        foreign_keys="AdjudicationResult.line_item_id",
        order_by="AdjudicationResult.revision",
    )
    latest_result: Mapped[AdjudicationResult | None] = relationship(
        "AdjudicationResult",
        foreign_keys=[latest_result_id],
        primaryjoin="LineItem.latest_result_id == AdjudicationResult.id",
    )

class Dispute(Base):
    """A member's challenge to a denied or partially-approved claim.
    
    One dispute per claim maximum, enforced by the unique FK constraint.
    """
    __tablename__ = "disputes"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), unique=True, nullable=False
    )
    reason: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    reviewer_note: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    submitted_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    resolved_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    status: Mapped[DisputeStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(DisputeStatus), nullable=False, default=DisputeStatus.pending
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="dispute")

class Payment(Base):
    """Payment record created when a claim transitions to ``paid``."""
    __tablename__ = "payments"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), unique=True, nullable=False
    )
    amount: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    paid_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="payment")
```

---

## 2. COMPLETE DOMAIN CONCEPTS

File: `/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md`

The domain defines these core entities:

- **Member**: Individual insured person (exactly one active policy at a time)
- **Provider**: Healthcare professional or facility with NPI
- **Plan**: Benefit structure template with deductible and coverage rules
- **Policy**: Member's instance of a plan for a policy period (start/end dates)
- **Claim**: Reimbursement request with one or more line items
- **Line Item**: Single billable service with diagnosis code (ICD-10), procedure code (CPT), and billed amount
- **Adjudication Result**: Outcome of evaluating a line item against the policy
- **Accumulator**: Running deductible total per member per policy period
- **Coverage Rule**: CPT code coverage at plan level (is_covered + coverage_percentage)

---

## 3. ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA SUMMARY

File: `/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/acceptance-criteria.md`

Key requirements:
1. **Claim Submission**: Claims with 1+ line items, returns claim ID with status `submitted`
2. **Coverage Adjudication**: Line-item level evaluation, deductible tracking across claims in same period
3. **Claim Lifecycle**: `submitted → under_review → [approved|denied|partially_approved] → paid`
4. **Decision Transparency**: Human-readable explanations referencing policy rules
5. **Disputes**: Can dispute `denied` or `partially_approved` claims once, returns to `under_review`
6. **Policy & Coverage**: Policy defines covered service types, coverage percentage, deductible, period
7. **API Correctness**: Appropriate HTTP status codes, JSON responses
8. **Data Integrity**: 2 decimal place precision, member can't claim against wrong policy
9. **Observability**: INFO level logging for transitions, ERROR level for failures
10. **Non-Functional**: Responses within 2 seconds, test coverage for adjudication, deductible, state machine, APIs

---

## 4. FIELD DEFINITIONS, VALUE RANGES & CONSTRAINTS

### Member Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `name` | String(255) | NOT NULL | Valid person name |
| `date_of_birth` | Date | NOT NULL | Must be in past |
| `email` | String(255) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE | Valid email format |
| `phone` | String(50) | NULLABLE | Phone number format (optional) |
| `created_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

### Provider Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `name` | String(255) | NOT NULL | Valid facility/professional name |
| `npi` | String(20) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE | National Provider Identifier (11 digits) |
| `provider_type` | Enum(ProviderType) | NOT NULL | Values: `individual`, `facility` |
| `created_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

### Plan Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `name` | String(255) | NOT NULL | Plan name |
| `deductible` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | > 0.00, monetary precision |
| `created_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

### CoverageRule Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `plan_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Plan | N/A |
| `cpt_code` | String(20) | NOT NULL | CPT procedure code (5 digits) |
| `is_covered` | Boolean | NOT NULL | True/False |
| `coverage_percentage` | Numeric(5,4) | NOT NULL | 0.0000-1.0000 (e.g., 0.8000 = 80%) |
| `created_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Unique constraint**: `(plan_id, cpt_code)` enforced at service layer (SQLite limitation)
**Coverage rule logic**: If CPT code absent from plan → service denied (not covered)

### Policy Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `member_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Member | N/A |
| `plan_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Plan | N/A |
| `start_date` | Date | NOT NULL | Policy period begins |
| `end_date` | Date | NOT NULL | Policy period ends; must be >= start_date |
| `status` | Enum(PolicyStatus) | NOT NULL, default=active | Values: `active`, `expired`, `cancelled` |
| `created_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Partial unique constraint**: `(member_id, status='active')` enforced at service layer (one active policy per member)
**Coverage period**: Claims only valid for `date_of_service` in `[start_date, end_date]`

### Accumulator Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `member_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Member | Denormalized from Policy for query efficiency |
| `policy_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE, FK → Policy | One accumulator per policy |
| `deductible_met` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL, default=0.00 | >= 0.00, <= Policy.deductible |
| `created_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `updated_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, onupdate=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Unique constraint**: `(member_id, policy_id)` — uq_accumulator_member_policy
**Business rule**: Resets (new row) when policy period changes

### Claim Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `member_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Member | N/A |
| `policy_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Policy | Must match member's active policy at date_of_service |
| `provider_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Provider | N/A |
| `date_of_service` | Date | NOT NULL | Must fall within `Policy.start_date` to `Policy.end_date` |
| `status` | Enum(ClaimStatus) | NOT NULL, default=submitted | Values: `submitted`, `under_review`, `approved`, `denied`, `partially_approved`, `paid` |
| `review_type` | Enum(ReviewType) | NOT NULL, default=auto | Values: `auto` (initial), `manual` (post-dispute) |
| `submitted_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `updated_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, onupdate=now | Updated on status change |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**State Machine**:
```
submitted → under_review → approved → paid
                        → denied → [under_review (if disputed)] → paid
                        → partially_approved → paid
                                           → [under_review (if disputed)]
```
**Business rules**:
- Status is stored, NOT derived (written only by adjudication/dispute handlers)
- State transitions are timestamped (ClaimStatusHistory)
- Claim status derived from LineItem outcomes at transaction end
- Can be disputed maximum once

### LineItem Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `claim_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Claim | N/A |
| `diagnosis_code` | String(20) | NOT NULL | ICD-10 code (e.g., M54.5) |
| `cpt_code` | String(20) | NOT NULL | CPT procedure code (e.g., 99213) |
| `billed_amount` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | > 0.00, basis for all adjudication |
| `adjudication_status` | Enum(LineItemStatus) | NOT NULL, default=pending | Values: `pending`, `approved`, `denied` |
| `latest_result_id` | String(36) | NULLABLE, FK → AdjudicationResult | Points to most recent adjudication result |
| `updated_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, onupdate=now | Updated on adjudication |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Business rules**:
- Claim must have at least 1 line item
- On re-adjudication (dispute), status reset to `pending` and `latest_result_id` cleared
- `latest_result_id` updated atomically during adjudication transaction

### AdjudicationResult Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `line_item_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → LineItem | N/A |
| `revision` | Integer | NOT NULL | Starts at 1, increments on re-adjudication |
| `is_covered` | Boolean | NOT NULL | True if CPT code covered on plan |
| `applied_to_deductible` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00, <= line item billed_amount |
| `plan_pays` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00 |
| `member_owes` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00 |
| `explanation` | Text | NOT NULL | Human-readable decision rationale |
| `adjudicated_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |

**Unique constraint**: `(line_item_id, revision)` — uq_adjudication_line_revision
**Immutability**: Append-only, never mutated; re-adjudication creates new row with revision+1
**Adjudication formula** (per line item):
```
remaining_deductible = plan.deductible - accumulator.deductible_met
applied_to_deductible = min(billed_amount, remaining_deductible)
amount_after_deductible = billed_amount - applied_to_deductible
plan_pays = amount_after_deductible * coverage_percentage
member_owes = applied_to_deductible + (amount_after_deductible * (1 - coverage_percentage))
```

### ClaimStatusHistory Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `claim_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Claim | N/A |
| `from_status` | Enum(ClaimStatus) | NULLABLE | Null for initial `submitted` |
| `to_status` | Enum(ClaimStatus) | NOT NULL | Target status |
| `transitioned_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Timestamp of transition |
| `note` | Text | NULLABLE | Optional context (e.g., "dispute submitted") |

**Immutability**: Append-only audit log; never mutated; no soft delete

### Dispute Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `claim_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE, FK → Claim | One-to-one: max 1 dispute per claim |
| `reason` | Text | NOT NULL | Member's stated reason for dispute |
| `reviewer_note` | Text | NULLABLE | Human reviewer's findings |
| `submitted_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `resolved_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Set when status → resolved |
| `status` | Enum(DisputeStatus) | NOT NULL, default=pending | Values: `pending`, `resolved` |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Business rules**:
- Can only dispute `denied` or `partially_approved` claims
- Dispute moves claim back to `under_review`
- After re-adjudication, claim reaches new final state
- Can only dispute once (enforced by checking Dispute existence, not via counter)

### Payment Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `claim_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE, FK → Claim | One-to-one: max 1 payment per claim |
| `amount` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00, sum of `plan_pays` from approved line items only |
| `paid_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Business rules**:
- Created automatically when claim transitions to `paid`
- Amount calculated as sum of `plan_pays` across approved line items
- For `partially_approved` claims: created when explicitly accepted or after re-adjudication with no further dispute

---

## 5. EXISTING CONSTRAINTS IN MODELS

### Database-Level Constraints

1. **Primary Keys**: All models use UUID (String(36)) as PK with auto-generation
2. **Foreign Keys**: Properly defined with correct referential relationships
3. **Unique Constraints**:
   - `Member.email` — UNIQUE
   - `Provider.npi` — UNIQUE
   - `Accumulator.(member_id, policy_id)` — uq_accumulator_member_policy
   - `AdjudicationResult.(line_item_id, revision)` — uq_adjudication_line_revision
   - `Dispute.claim_id` — UNIQUE (one-to-one)
   - `Payment.claim_id` — UNIQUE (one-to-one)

4. **Soft Deletes**: `deleted_at` NULLABLE on: Member, Provider, Plan, CoverageRule, Policy, Accumulator, Claim, LineItem, Dispute, Payment
   - NOT on: ClaimStatusHistory, AdjudicationResult (append-only audit tables)

5. **Default Values**:
   - All `*_at` timestamps default to `datetime.utcnow`
   - `Accumulator.deductible_met` defaults to `Decimal("0.00")`
   - `PolicyStatus` defaults to `active`
   - `ClaimStatus` defaults to `submitted`
   - `ReviewType` defaults to `auto`
   - `LineItemStatus` defaults to `pending`
   - `DisputeStatus` defaults to `pending`

6. **OnUpdate Triggers**:
   - `Accumulator.updated_at` — auto-updated on change
   - `Claim.updated_at` — auto-updated on change
   - `LineItem.updated_at` — auto-updated on change

### Service-Layer Constraints (NOT in database)

1. **Policy.start_date <= Policy.end_date** — validated at application layer
2. **Claim.date_of_service within [Policy.start_date, Policy.end_date]** — validated at claim submission
3. **(Plan.id, CoverageRule.cpt_code) uniqueness** — enforced at service layer (SQLite lacks partial indexes without triggers)
4. **Member has exactly one active Policy** — enforced at service layer (partial unique index not possible in SQLite)
5. **Claim.status state transitions** — enforced by adjudication engine and dispute handler only
6. **LineItem.adjudication_status derived from AdjudicationResult** — set by adjudication transaction only
7. **Monetary precision** — all amounts stored as Numeric(10,2) in SQLite, validated as Decimal in Python
8. **One-dispute rule** — enforced by checking Dispute.claim_id FK existence

---

## 6. RECOMMENDED CHECK CONSTRAINTS

Based on business rules and domain concepts, the following CHECK constraints would be applicable:

### Plan Model
```sql
CHECK (deductible > 0)
```

### CoverageRule Model
```sql
CHECK (coverage_percentage >= 0 AND coverage_percentage <= 1)
CHECK (is_covered IN (true, false))
```

### Policy Model
```sql
CHECK (end_date >= start_date)
CHECK (status IN ('active', 'expired', 'cancelled'))
```

### Accumulator Model
```sql
CHECK (deductible_met >= 0)
```

### Claim Model
```sql
CHECK (status IN ('submitted', 'under_review', 'approved', 'denied', 'partially_approved', 'paid'))
CHECK (review_type IN ('auto', 'manual'))
```

### LineItem Model
```sql
CHECK (billed_amount > 0)
CHECK (adjudication_status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'denied'))
```

### AdjudicationResult Model
```sql
CHECK (revision >= 1)
CHECK (applied_to_deductible >= 0)
CHECK (plan_pays >= 0)
CHECK (member_owes >= 0)
CHECK (applied_to_deductible + plan_pays + member_owes = billed_amount)  -- Complex constraint
```

### Dispute Model
```sql
CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'resolved'))
```

### Payment Model
```sql
CHECK (amount >= 0)
```

---

## 7. KEY ARCHITECTURAL NOTES

1. **Transaction Boundary**: Adjudication updates (LineItem status, AdjudicationResult rows, Accumulator, Claim status, ClaimStatusHistory, Payment) must occur atomically in a single transaction to prevent deductible double-spending.

2. **Append-Only Audit Tables**: ClaimStatusHistory and AdjudicationResult are immutable and never have soft deletes — they preserve complete audit trails.

3. **Soft Deletes**: All business entities support soft deletes via `deleted_at`. Application queries must filter `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL`.

4. **Monetary Precision**: All amounts use Numeric(10,2) for SQLite and Decimal in Python — never float.

5. **Service-Layer Validation**: Several constraints (one active policy per member, CoverageRule uniqueness per plan, state machine transitions) are enforced in service layer code, not database constraints, due to SQLite limitations.

6. **Denormalized Fields**: Accumulator.member_id is intentionally carried to allow direct member-scoped queries without joins.

7. **Circular FK Resolution**: LineItem.latest_result_id → AdjudicationResult uses `use_alter=True` to resolve the circular dependency with AdjudicationResult.line_item_id.

---

```python
"""All enums and ORM models for the claims processing system.

Models are defined in FK-dependency order so SQLAlchemy can resolve
relationships without forward-reference strings:

import enum
import uuid
from datetime import date, datetime
from decimal import Decimal

from sqlalchemy import (

from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship

from .extensions import Base

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enums
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ProviderType(enum.Enum):
    individual = "individual"

class PolicyStatus(enum.Enum):

class ClaimStatus(enum.Enum):

    under_review = "under_review"

class ReviewType(enum.Enum):
    auto = "auto"
    manual = "manual"

class LineItemStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"

class DisputeStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    resolved = "resolved"

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class Member(Base):
    """An individual insured person."""
    __tablename__ = "members"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    date_of_birth: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)

    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="member")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="member")
    accumulators: Mapped[list["Accumulator"]] = relationship("Accumulator", back_populates="member")

class Provider(Base):
    """A healthcare professional or facility."""
    __tablename__ = "providers"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    npi: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), unique=True, nullable=False)
    provider_type: Mapped[ProviderType] = mapped_column(Enum(ProviderType), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

class Plan(Base):
    """Benefit structure template: coverage rules and deductible amount."""
    __tablename__ = "plans"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)

    coverage_rules: Mapped[list["CoverageRule"]] = relationship(
        "CoverageRule", back_populates="plan"
    )
    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="plan")

class CoverageRule(Base):
    """Coverage definition for a single CPT code on a plan.
    
    The (plan_id, cpt_code) uniqueness constraint for active rules is enforced
    at the service layer because SQLite lacks partial indexes without triggers.
    """
    __tablename__ = "coverage_rules"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    plan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("plans.id"), nullable=False)
    cpt_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False)
    is_covered: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False)
    coverage_percentage: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(5, 4), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    plan: Mapped[Plan] = relationship("Plan", back_populates="coverage_rules")

class Policy(Base):
    """A member's active instance of a plan for a specific policy period."""
    __tablename__ = "policies"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    plan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("plans.id"), nullable=False)

    end_date: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[PolicyStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(PolicyStatus), nullable=False, default=PolicyStatus.active
    )
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="policies")
    plan: Mapped[Plan] = relationship("Plan", back_populates="policies")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="policy")
    accumulator: Mapped["Accumulator | None"] = relationship(
        "Accumulator", back_populates="policy", uselist=False

class Accumulator(Base):
    """Running deductible total per member per policy period."""
    __tablename__ = "accumulators"

        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="accumulators")
    policy: Mapped[Policy] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="accumulator")

class Claim(Base):
    """A reimbursement request submitted by or on behalf of a member."""
    __tablename__ = "claims"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    policy_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("policies.id"), nullable=False)
    provider_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("providers.id"), nullable=False)
    date_of_service: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[ClaimStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=False, default=ClaimStatus.submitted
    )
    review_type: Mapped[ReviewType] = mapped_column(
        Enum(ReviewType), nullable=False, default=ReviewType.auto
    )
    submitted_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    
    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="claims")
    policy: Mapped[Policy] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="claims")

    line_items: Mapped[list["LineItem"]] = relationship(
        "LineItem",
        back_populates="claim",
        foreign_keys="LineItem.claim_id",
    )
    status_history: Mapped[list["ClaimStatusHistory"]] = relationship(
        "ClaimStatusHistory", back_populates="claim", order_by="ClaimStatusHistory.transitioned_at"

    dispute: Mapped["Dispute | None"] = relationship(
        "Dispute", back_populates="claim", uselist=False

    payment: Mapped["Payment | None"] = relationship(
        "Payment", back_populates="claim", uselist=False
    )

class ClaimStatusHistory(Base):
    """Append-only audit log of claim status transitions."""
    __tablename__ = "claim_status_history"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), nullable=False)
    from_status: Mapped[ClaimStatus | None] = mapped_column(Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=True)
    to_status: Mapped[ClaimStatus] = mapped_column(Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=False)

class AdjudicationResult(Base):
    """Immutable record of a single adjudication pass on a line item.
    
    Re-adjudication appends a new row (revision + 1) rather than mutating.
    """
    __tablename__ = "adjudication_results"
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("line_item_id", "revision", name="uq_adjudication_line_revision"),

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    line_item_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("line_items.id"), nullable=False
    )
    revision: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False)
    is_covered: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False)

    member_owes: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)

    )

        String(36),

    )

        "AdjudicationResult",

class Dispute(Base):
    """A member's challenge to a denied or partially-approved claim.

    __tablename__ = "disputes"
    
    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))

    )

class Payment(Base):
    """Payment record created when a claim transitions to ``paid``."""
    __tablename__ = "payments"

---

## 2. COMPLETE DOMAIN CONCEPTS

File: `/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md`

The domain defines these core entities:

- **Member**: Individual insured person (exactly one active policy at a time)
- **Provider**: Healthcare professional or facility with NPI
- **Plan**: Benefit structure template with deductible and coverage rules
- **Policy**: Member's instance of a plan for a policy period (start/end dates)
- **Claim**: Reimbursement request with one or more line items
- **Line Item**: Single billable service with diagnosis code (ICD-10), procedure code (CPT), and billed amount
- **Adjudication Result**: Outcome of evaluating a line item against the policy
- **Accumulator**: Running deductible total per member per policy period
- **Coverage Rule**: CPT code coverage at plan level (is_covered + coverage_percentage)

---

## 3. ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA SUMMARY

File: `/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/acceptance-criteria.md`

Key requirements:
1. **Claim Submission**: Claims with 1+ line items, returns claim ID with status `submitted`
2. **Coverage Adjudication**: Line-item level evaluation, deductible tracking across claims in same period
3. **Claim Lifecycle**: `submitted → under_review → [approved|denied|partially_approved] → paid`
4. **Decision Transparency**: Human-readable explanations referencing policy rules
5. **Disputes**: Can dispute `denied` or `partially_approved` claims once, returns to `under_review`
6. **Policy & Coverage**: Policy defines covered service types, coverage percentage, deductible, period
7. **API Correctness**: Appropriate HTTP status codes, JSON responses
8. **Data Integrity**: 2 decimal place precision, member can't claim against wrong policy
9. **Observability**: INFO level logging for transitions, ERROR level for failures
10. **Non-Functional**: Responses within 2 seconds, test coverage for adjudication, deductible, state machine, APIs

---

## 4. FIELD DEFINITIONS, VALUE RANGES & CONSTRAINTS

### Member Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|

| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |

**State Machine**:
```
submitted → under_review → approved → paid
                        → denied → [under_review (if disputed)] → paid
                        → partially_approved → paid
                                           → [under_review (if disputed)]
```

- Status is stored, NOT derived (written only by adjudication/dispute handlers)
- State transitions are timestamped (ClaimStatusHistory)
- Claim status derived from LineItem outcomes at transaction end
- Can be disputed maximum once

| `cpt_code` | String(20) | NOT NULL | CPT procedure code (e.g., 99213) |
| `billed_amount` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | > 0.00, basis for all adjudication |
| `adjudication_status` | Enum(LineItemStatus) | NOT NULL, default=pending | Values: `pending`, `approved`, `denied` |
| `latest_result_id` | String(36) | NULLABLE, FK → AdjudicationResult | Points to most recent adjudication result |
| `updated_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, onupdate=now | Updated on adjudication |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Business rules**:
- Claim must have at least 1 line item
- On re-adjudication (dispute), status reset to `pending` and `latest_result_id` cleared
- `latest_result_id` updated atomically during adjudication transaction

### AdjudicationResult Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `line_item_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → LineItem | N/A |
| `revision` | Integer | NOT NULL | Starts at 1, increments on re-adjudication |
| `is_covered` | Boolean | NOT NULL | True if CPT code covered on plan |
| `applied_to_deductible` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00, <= line item billed_amount |
| `plan_pays` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00 |
| `member_owes` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00 |
| `explanation` | Text | NOT NULL | Human-readable decision rationale |
| `adjudicated_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |

**Unique constraint**: `(line_item_id, revision)` — uq_adjudication_line_revision
**Immutability**: Append-only, never mutated; re-adjudication creates new row with revision+1
**Adjudication formula** (per line item):
```
remaining_deductible = plan.deductible - accumulator.deductible_met
applied_to_deductible = min(billed_amount, remaining_deductible)
amount_after_deductible = billed_amount - applied_to_deductible
plan_pays = amount_after_deductible * coverage_percentage
member_owes = applied_to_deductible + (amount_after_deductible * (1 - coverage_percentage))
```

### ClaimStatusHistory Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `claim_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, FK → Claim | N/A |
| `from_status` | Enum(ClaimStatus) | NULLABLE | Null for initial `submitted` |
| `to_status` | Enum(ClaimStatus) | NOT NULL | Target status |
| `transitioned_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Timestamp of transition |
| `note` | Text | NULLABLE | Optional context (e.g., "dispute submitted") |

**Immutability**: Append-only audit log; never mutated; no soft delete

### Dispute Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `claim_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE, FK → Claim | One-to-one: max 1 dispute per claim |
| `reason` | Text | NOT NULL | Member's stated reason for dispute |
| `reviewer_note` | Text | NULLABLE | Human reviewer's findings |
| `submitted_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `resolved_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Set when status → resolved |
| `status` | Enum(DisputeStatus) | NOT NULL, default=pending | Values: `pending`, `resolved` |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Business rules**:
- Can only dispute `denied` or `partially_approved` claims
- Dispute moves claim back to `under_review`
- After re-adjudication, claim reaches new final state
- Can only dispute once (enforced by checking Dispute existence, not via counter)

### Payment Model
| Field | Type | Constraints | Business Rules |
|-------|------|-------------|----------------|
| `id` | String(36) UUID | PK, auto-generated | N/A |
| `claim_id` | String(36) | NOT NULL, UNIQUE, FK → Claim | One-to-one: max 1 payment per claim |
| `amount` | Numeric(10,2) | NOT NULL | >= 0.00, sum of `plan_pays` from approved line items only |
| `paid_at` | DateTime | NOT NULL, default=now | Audit timestamp |
| `deleted_at` | DateTime | NULLABLE | Soft delete marker |

**Business rules**:
- Created automatically when claim transitions to `paid`
- Amount calculated as sum of `plan_pays` across approved line items
- For `partially_approved` claims: created when explicitly accepted or after re-adjudication with no further dispute

---

## 5. EXISTING CONSTRAINTS IN MODELS

### Database-Level Constraints

1. **Primary Keys**: All models use UUID (String(36)) as PK with auto-generation
2. **Foreign Keys**: Properly defined with correct referential relationships
3. **Unique Constraints**:
   - `Member.email` — UNIQUE
   - `Provider.npi` — UNIQUE
   - `Accumulator.(member_id, policy_id)` — uq_accumulator_member_policy
   - `AdjudicationResult.(line_item_id, revision)` — uq_adjudication_line_revision
   - `Dispute.claim_id` — UNIQUE (one-to-one)
   - `Payment.claim_id` — UNIQUE (one-to-one)

4. **Soft Deletes**: `deleted_at` NULLABLE on: Member, Provider, Plan, CoverageRule, Policy, Accumulator, Claim, LineItem, Dispute, Payment
   - NOT on: ClaimStatusHistory, AdjudicationResult (append-only audit tables)

5. **Default Values**:
   - All `*_at` timestamps default to `datetime.utcnow`
   - `Accumulator.deductible_met` defaults to `Decimal("0.00")`
   - `PolicyStatus` defaults to `active`
   - `ClaimStatus` defaults to `submitted`
   - `ReviewType` defaults to `auto`
   - `LineItemStatus` defaults to `pending`
   - `DisputeStatus` defaults to `pending`

6. **OnUpdate Triggers**:
   - `Accumulator.updated_at` — auto-updated on change
   - `Claim.updated_at` — auto-updated on change
   - `LineItem.updated_at` — auto-updated on change

### Service-Layer Constraints (NOT in database)

1. **Policy.start_date <= Policy.end_date** — validated at application layer
2. **Claim.date_of_service within [Policy.start_date, Policy.end_date]** — validated at claim submission
3. **(Plan.id, CoverageRule.cpt_code) uniqueness** — enforced at service layer (SQLite lacks partial indexes without triggers)
4. **Member has exactly one active Policy** — enforced at service layer (partial unique index not possible in SQLite)
5. **Claim.status state transitions** — enforced by adjudication engine and dispute handler only
6. **LineItem.adjudication_status derived from AdjudicationResult** — set by adjudication transaction only
7. **Monetary precision** — all amounts stored as Numeric(10,2) in SQLite, validated as Decimal in Python
8. **One-dispute rule** — enforced by checking Dispute.claim_id FK existence

---

## 6. RECOMMENDED CHECK CONSTRAINTS

Based on business rules and domain concepts, the following CHECK constraints would be applicable:

### Plan Model
```sql
CHECK (deductible > 0)
```

### CoverageRule Model
```sql
CHECK (coverage_percentage >= 0 AND coverage_percentage <= 1)
CHECK (is_covered IN (true, false))
```

### Policy Model
```sql
CHECK (end_date >= start_date)
CHECK (status IN ('active', 'expired', 'cancelled'))
```

### Accumulator Model
```sql
CHECK (deductible_met >= 0)
```

### Claim Model
```sql
CHECK (status IN ('submitted', 'under_review', 'approved', 'denied', 'partially_approved', 'paid'))
CHECK (review_type IN ('auto', 'manual'))
```

### LineItem Model
```sql
CHECK (billed_amount > 0)
CHECK (adjudication_status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'denied'))
```

### AdjudicationResult Model
```sql
CHECK (revision >= 1)
CHECK (applied_to_deductible >= 0)
CHECK (plan_pays >= 0)
CHECK (member_owes >= 0)
CHECK (applied_to_deductible + plan_pays + member_owes = billed_amount)  -- Complex constraint
```

### Dispute Model
```sql
CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'resolved'))
```

### Payment Model
```sql
CHECK (amount >= 0)
```

---

## 7. KEY ARCHITECTURAL NOTES

1. **Transaction Boundary**: Adjudication updates (LineItem status, AdjudicationResult rows, Accumulator, Claim status, ClaimStatusHistory, Payment) must occur atomically in a single transaction to prevent deductible double-spending.

2. **Append-Only Audit Tables**: ClaimStatusHistory and AdjudicationResult are immutable and never have soft deletes — they preserve complete audit trails.

3. **Soft Deletes**: All business entities support soft deletes via `deleted_at`. Application queries must filter `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL`.

4. **Monetary Precision**: All amounts use Numeric(10,2) for SQLite and Decimal in Python — never float.

5. **Service-Layer Validation**: Several constraints (one active policy per member, CoverageRule uniqueness per plan, state machine transitions) are enforced in service layer code, not database constraints, due to SQLite limitations.

6. **Denormalized Fields**: Accumulator.member_id is intentionally carried to allow direct member-scoped queries without joins.

7. **Circular FK Resolution**: LineItem.latest_result_id → AdjudicationResult uses `use_alter=True` to resolve the circular dependency with AdjudicationResult.line_item_id.

---

"""All enums and ORM models for the claims processing system.

Models are defined in FK-dependency order so SQLAlchemy can resolve
relationships without forward-reference strings:
Member → Provider → Plan → CoverageRule → Policy → Accumulator →
Claim → ClaimStatusHistory → AdjudicationResult → LineItem → Dispute → Payment
"""

import enum
import uuid
from datetime import date, datetime
from decimal import Decimal

from sqlalchemy import (
    Boolean,
    Date,
    DateTime,
    Enum,
    ForeignKey,
    Integer,
    Numeric,
    String,
    Text,
    UniqueConstraint,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship

from .extensions import Base

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enums
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


class ProviderType(enum.Enum):
    individual = "individual"
    facility = "facility"


class PolicyStatus(enum.Enum):
    active = "active"
    expired = "expired"
    cancelled = "cancelled"


class ClaimStatus(enum.Enum):
    submitted = "submitted"
    under_review = "under_review"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"

# Plan: Add Check Constraints to Models

## Context

The SQLAlchemy models have business rules documented in `docs/domain-concepts.md` (e.g., coverage percentages must be 0–1, billed amounts must be positive, deductibles must be positive) that are currently only enforced at the service layer or not at all. Adding `CheckConstraint` to the model `__table_args__` enforces these rules at the database level, preventing bad data even if service-layer validation is bypassed.

Since no migrations exist yet (`migrations/` directory is absent), we will initialize Flask-Migrate, then drop and recreate `instance/claims.db` so the new constraints take effect.

---

## Constraints to Add

| Model (`__tablename__`) | Constraint expression | Constraint name |
|---|---|---|
| `Plan` (`plans`) | `deductible > 0` | `ck_plans_deductible_positive` |
| `CoverageRule` (`coverage_rules`) | `coverage_percentage >= 0 AND coverage_percentage <= 1` | `ck_coverage_rules_percentage_range` |
| `Policy` (`policies`) | `end_date >= start_date` | `ck_policies_end_after_start` |
| `Accumulator` (`accumulators`) | `deductible_met >= 0` | `ck_accumulators_deductible_met_non_negative` |
| `LineItem` (`line_items`) | `billed_amount > 0` | `ck_line_items_billed_amount_positive` |
| `AdjudicationResult` (`adjudication_results`) | `revision >= 1` | `ck_adjudication_results_revision_min` |
| `AdjudicationResult` (`adjudication_results`) | `applied_to_deductible >= 0` | `ck_adjudication_results_applied_non_negative` |
| `AdjudicationResult` (`adjudication_results`) | `plan_pays >= 0` | `ck_adjudication_results_plan_pays_non_negative` |
| `AdjudicationResult` (`adjudication_results`) | `member_owes >= 0` | `ck_adjudication_results_member_owes_non_negative` |
| `Payment` (`payments`) | `amount >= 0` | `ck_payments_amount_non_negative` |

**Excluded (with rationale):**
- `Member.date_of_birth < current_date` — dynamic date comparisons in SQLite CHECK constraints are unreliable across environments
- `Claim.date_of_service` within policy dates — cross-table constraint, not expressible in a single-table CHECK
- Enum value checks — already enforced by SQLAlchemy `Enum` column type

---

## Critical Files

- **`app/models.py`** — add `CheckConstraint` to imports and to `__table_args__` of each affected model
- **`tests/integration/test_check_constraints.py`** — new file; integration tests for each constraint
- **`tests/conftest.py`** — new file; shared pytest fixtures (in-memory SQLite test DB)
- **`instance/claims.db`** — must be deleted and recreated via migrations

---

## Implementation Steps

### 1. Write tests first (TDD)

Create `tests/conftest.py` with a pytest fixture that spins up an in-memory SQLite database using `db.create_all()` against the Flask test app.

Create `tests/integration/test_check_constraints.py` with one test per constraint that:
- Inserts a valid parent row (Member, Plan, etc.) to satisfy FK requirements
- Attempts to insert a row violating the constraint
- Asserts `sqlalchemy.exc.IntegrityError` is raised

### 2. Modify `app/models.py`

Add `CheckConstraint` to the SQLAlchemy import line. For each model listed above, add or extend `__table_args__` as a tuple:

- Models **without** existing `__table_args__`: `Plan`, `CoverageRule`, `Policy`, `LineItem`, `Payment` — add new `__table_args__` tuple
- Models **with** existing `__table_args__`: `Accumulator` (has `UniqueConstraint`) and `AdjudicationResult` (has `UniqueConstraint`) — append `CheckConstraint`(s) to the existing tuple

### 3. Initialize migrations and recreate DB

```bash
# Delete stale DB (no production data at risk)
rm instance/claims.db

# Initialize Flask-Migrate
flask db init

# Autogenerate initial migration (will include CheckConstraints in CREATE TABLE)
flask db migrate -m "initial schema with check constraints"

# Apply
flask db upgrade
```

### 4. Run quality checks and tests

```bash
ruff format app/ tests/
ruff check app/ tests/
mypy app/
pytest tests/
```

---

## Verification

- Each test in `tests/integration/test_check_constraints.py` should raise `IntegrityError` when a constraint-violating row is inserted
- `flask db upgrade` should complete without errors
- `ruff` and `mypy` should pass clean

"""All enums and ORM models for the claims processing system.

Models are defined in FK-dependency order so SQLAlchemy can resolve
relationships without forward-reference strings:
Member → Provider → Plan → CoverageRule → Policy → Accumulator →
Claim → ClaimStatusHistory → AdjudicationResult → LineItem → Dispute → Payment
"""

import enum
import uuid
from datetime import date, datetime
from decimal import Decimal

from sqlalchemy import (
    Boolean,
    Date,
    DateTime,
    Enum,
    ForeignKey,
    Integer,
    Numeric,
    String,
    Text,
    UniqueConstraint,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship

from .extensions import Base

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enums
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


class ProviderType(enum.Enum):
    individual = "individual"
    facility = "facility"


class PolicyStatus(enum.Enum):
    active = "active"
    expired = "expired"
    cancelled = "cancelled"


class ClaimStatus(enum.Enum):
    submitted = "submitted"
    under_review = "under_review"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"
    partially_approved = "partially_approved"
    paid = "paid"


class ReviewType(enum.Enum):
    auto = "auto"
    manual = "manual"


class LineItemStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"


class DisputeStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    resolved = "resolved"


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


class Member(Base):
    """An individual insured person."""

    __tablename__ = "members"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    date_of_birth: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    email: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    phone: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=True)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="member")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="member")
    accumulators: Mapped[list["Accumulator"]] = relationship("Accumulator", back_populates="member")


class Provider(Base):
    """A healthcare professional or facility."""

    __tablename__ = "providers"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    npi: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), unique=True, nullable=False)
    provider_type: Mapped[ProviderType] = mapped_column(Enum(ProviderType), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)


class Plan(Base):
    """Benefit structure template: coverage rules and deductible amount."""

    __tablename__ = "plans"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    deductible: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    coverage_rules: Mapped[list["CoverageRule"]] = relationship(
        "CoverageRule", back_populates="plan"
    )
    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="plan")


class CoverageRule(Base):
    """Coverage definition for a single CPT code on a plan.

    The (plan_id, cpt_code) uniqueness constraint for active rules is enforced
    at the service layer because SQLite lacks partial indexes without triggers.
    """

    __tablename__ = "coverage_rules"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    plan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("plans.id"), nullable=False)
    cpt_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False)
    is_covered: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False)
    coverage_percentage: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(5, 4), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    plan: Mapped[Plan] = relationship("Plan", back_populates="coverage_rules")


class Policy(Base):
    """A member's active instance of a plan for a specific policy period."""

    __tablename__ = "policies"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    plan_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("plans.id"), nullable=False)
    start_date: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    end_date: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[PolicyStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(PolicyStatus), nullable=False, default=PolicyStatus.active
    )
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="policies")
    plan: Mapped[Plan] = relationship("Plan", back_populates="policies")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="policy")
    accumulator: Mapped["Accumulator | None"] = relationship(
        "Accumulator", back_populates="policy", uselist=False
    )


class Accumulator(Base):
    """Running deductible total per member per policy period."""

    __tablename__ = "accumulators"
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("member_id", "policy_id", name="uq_accumulator_member_policy"),
    )

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    policy_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("policies.id"), unique=True, nullable=False
    )
    deductible_met: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(
        Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False, default=Decimal("0.00")
    )
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="accumulators")
    policy: Mapped[Policy] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="accumulator")


class Claim(Base):
    """A reimbursement request submitted by or on behalf of a member."""

    __tablename__ = "claims"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    member_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("members.id"), nullable=False)
    policy_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("policies.id"), nullable=False)
    provider_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("providers.id"), nullable=False)
    date_of_service: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    status: Mapped[ClaimStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=False, default=ClaimStatus.submitted
    )
    review_type: Mapped[ReviewType] = mapped_column(
        Enum(ReviewType), nullable=False, default=ReviewType.auto
    )
    submitted_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="claims")
    policy: Mapped[Policy] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="claims")
    provider: Mapped[Provider] = relationship("Provider")
    line_items: Mapped[list["LineItem"]] = relationship(
        "LineItem",
        back_populates="claim",
        foreign_keys="LineItem.claim_id",
    )
    status_history: Mapped[list["ClaimStatusHistory"]] = relationship(
        "ClaimStatusHistory", back_populates="claim", order_by="ClaimStatusHistory.transitioned_at"
    )
    dispute: Mapped["Dispute | None"] = relationship(
        "Dispute", back_populates="claim", uselist=False
    )
    payment: Mapped["Payment | None"] = relationship(
        "Payment", back_populates="claim", uselist=False
    )


class ClaimStatusHistory(Base):
    """Append-only audit log of claim status transitions."""

    __tablename__ = "claim_status_history"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), nullable=False)
    from_status: Mapped[ClaimStatus | None] = mapped_column(Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=True)
    to_status: Mapped[ClaimStatus] = mapped_column(Enum(ClaimStatus), nullable=False)
    transitioned_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    note: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)

    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="status_history")


class AdjudicationResult(Base):
    """Immutable record of a single adjudication pass on a line item.

    Re-adjudication appends a new row (revision + 1) rather than mutating.
    """

    __tablename__ = "adjudication_results"
    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("line_item_id", "revision", name="uq_adjudication_line_revision"),
    )

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    line_item_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("line_items.id"), nullable=False
    )
    revision: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False)
    is_covered: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False)
    applied_to_deductible: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    plan_pays: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    member_owes: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    explanation: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    adjudicated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )

    line_item: Mapped["LineItem"] = relationship(
        "LineItem", back_populates="results", foreign_keys=[line_item_id]
    )


class LineItem(Base):
    """A single billable service within a claim.

    ``latest_result_id`` uses ``use_alter=True`` to resolve the mutual FK
    cycle with ``AdjudicationResult`` (SQLAlchemy emits it as a post-creation
    ALTER TABLE statement).
    """

    __tablename__ = "line_items"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), nullable=False)
    diagnosis_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False)
    cpt_code: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False)
    billed_amount: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    adjudication_status: Mapped[LineItemStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(LineItemStatus), nullable=False, default=LineItemStatus.pending
    )
    latest_result_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        ForeignKey("adjudication_results.id", use_alter=True, name="fk_line_item_latest_result"),
        nullable=True,
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship(
        "Claim", back_populates="line_items", foreign_keys=[claim_id]
    )
    results: Mapped[list[AdjudicationResult]] = relationship(
        "AdjudicationResult",
        back_populates="line_item",
        foreign_keys="AdjudicationResult.line_item_id",
        order_by="AdjudicationResult.revision",
    )
    latest_result: Mapped[AdjudicationResult | None] = relationship(
        "AdjudicationResult",
        foreign_keys=[latest_result_id],
        primaryjoin="LineItem.latest_result_id == AdjudicationResult.id",
    )


class Dispute(Base):
    """A member's challenge to a denied or partially-approved claim.

    One dispute per claim maximum, enforced by the unique FK constraint.
    """

    __tablename__ = "disputes"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), unique=True, nullable=False
    )
    reason: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
    reviewer_note: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    submitted_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow
    )
    resolved_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    status: Mapped[DisputeStatus] = mapped_column(
        Enum(DisputeStatus), nullable=False, default=DisputeStatus.pending
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="dispute")


class Payment(Base):
    """Payment record created when a claim transitions to ``paid``."""

    __tablename__ = "payments"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    claim_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36), ForeignKey("claims.id"), unique=True, nullable=False
    )
    amount: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(Numeric(10, 2), nullable=False)
    paid_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    claim: Mapped[Claim] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="payment")

Member → Provider → Plan → CoverageRule → Policy → Accumulator →

import enum
import uuid
from datetime import date, datetime

from sqlalchemy import (
    Boolean,
    CheckConstraint,
    Date,
    DateTime,
    Enum,
    ForeignKey,

class PolicyStatus(enum.Enum):

class ClaimStatus(enum.Enum):

    under_review = "under_review"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"
    partially_approved = "partially_approved"
    paid = "paid"


class ReviewType(enum.Enum):
    auto = "auto"
    manual = "manual"


class LineItemStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"


class DisputeStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    resolved = "resolved"

# Models

class Member(Base):
    """An individual insured person."""

    __tablename__ = "members"

    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="member")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="member")
    accumulators: Mapped[list["Accumulator"]] = relationship("Accumulator", back_populates="member")


class Provider(Base):

    __tablename__ = "providers"

class CoverageRule(Base):

    __tablename__ = "coverage_rules"

    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    member: Mapped[Member] = relationship("Member", back_populates="accumulators")
    policy: Mapped[Policy] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="accumulator")


class Claim(Base):
    """A reimbursement request submitted by or on behalf of a member."""

    __tablename__ = "claims"

    review_type: Mapped[ReviewType] = mapped_column(

    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

"""All enums and ORM models for the claims processing system.

Models are defined in FK-dependency order so SQLAlchemy can resolve
relationships without forward-reference strings:
Member → Provider → Plan → CoverageRule → Policy → Accumulator →
Claim → ClaimStatusHistory → AdjudicationResult → LineItem → Dispute → Payment
"""

import enum
import uuid
from datetime import date, datetime
from decimal import Decimal

from sqlalchemy import (
    Boolean,
    CheckConstraint,
    Date,
    DateTime,
    Enum,
    ForeignKey,
    Integer,
    Numeric,
    String,
    Text,
    UniqueConstraint,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship

from .extensions import Base

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enums
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


class ProviderType(enum.Enum):
    individual = "individual"
    facility = "facility"


class PolicyStatus(enum.Enum):
    active = "active"
    expired = "expired"
    cancelled = "cancelled"


class ClaimStatus(enum.Enum):
    submitted = "submitted"
    under_review = "under_review"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"
    partially_approved = "partially_approved"
    paid = "paid"


class ReviewType(enum.Enum):
    auto = "auto"
    manual = "manual"


class LineItemStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    approved = "approved"
    denied = "denied"


class DisputeStatus(enum.Enum):
    pending = "pending"
    resolved = "resolved"


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


class Member(Base):
    """An individual insured person."""

    __tablename__ = "members"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    date_of_birth: Mapped[date] = mapped_column(Date, nullable=False)
    email: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    phone: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=True)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)

    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="member")
    claims: Mapped[list["Claim"]] = relationship("Claim", back_populates="member")
    accumulators: Mapped[list["Accumulator"]] = relationship("Accumulator", back_populates="member")


class Provider(Base):
    """A healthcare professional or facility."""

    __tablename__ = "providers"

    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)
    npi: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), unique=True, nullable=False)
    provider_type: Mapped[ProviderType] = mapped_column(Enum(ProviderType), nullable=False)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=False, default=datetime.utcnow)
    deleted_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime, nullable=True)


class Plan(Base):
    """Benefit structure template: coverage rules and deductible amount."""

    __tablename__ = "plans"
    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint("deductible >= 0", name="ck_plans_deductible_non_negative"),
    )

    name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)

        "CoverageRule", back_populates="plan"

    policies: Mapped[list["Policy"]] = relationship("Policy", back_populates="plan")
